intended_use: INFINITT DPS is a software device intended for viewing and management of whole slide digital images derived from scanned surgical pathology slides prepared from formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded (FFPE
intended_use_full: INFINITT DPS is a software device intended for viewing and management of whole slide digital images derived from scanned surgical pathology slides prepared from formalin-fixed, paraffin-embedded (FFPE) tissue. It serves as an aid for pathologists to review and interpret these digital images for the purpose of pathology primary diagnosis.
target_condition: Surgical pathology specimens (FFPE tissue) requiring microscopic examination and diagnosis
ground_truth: Comparison to predicate device (NanoZoomer S360MD viewer) for image reproduction and measurement accuracy; human factors validation study with 15 representative users (pathologists and technologists)
other_metrics: Pixel-wise Color Comparison (CIEDE2000 ΔE₀₀): 95th percentile values averaged 0.00 (maximum 0); Measurement Accuracy: all results met acceptance criteria of ±2% or ±5 μm for length and ±5% for area; Turnaround Time: WSIs loaded within average of 2.8 seconds, interactions responded within average of 0.48 seconds
